generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a responsible citizen, I've been concerned about how our civil defense preparedness is being undermined by special interests. While we debate funding, foreign adversaries are actively testing our vulnerabilities. My neighbor's family had to evacuate last year when a critical infrastructure failure cascaded - they had no warning system in place. We can't afford to be complacent while others exploit our divisions. Basic preparedness isn't about fear - it's about responsible self-reliance in an uncertain world. #NationalSecurity #CommunityResilience
